title: Cancer Patients and Abdominal Pain: 11 Herbal Creams to Try
description: Echinacea purpurea creams can help with abdominal pain due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The creams contain constituents like alkylamides, glycosides, and caffeic acid, which may reduce swelling and ease pain. They also have antioxidant properties that can help protect the stomach lining from damage. The creams work by soothing the stomach and intestines, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections that may be causing the pain. If you're experiencing a...
